name: Jim Gordon
abstract: James Beck Gordon (July 14, 1945 – March 13, 2023) was an American musician, songwriter and convicted murderer. Gordon was a session drummer in the late 1960s and 1970s and played drums in the blues rock supergroup Derek and the Dominos.

about_quotes.speaker: Tom Scott
about_quotes.evidence: I just played them with all these wonderful, again sort of 60s Wrecking Crew musicians. ... Jim Gordon on drums
about_quotes.doc_title: Tom Scott interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, April 1, 2022 [interview 1 of 2]
